title: Create minimal healthsvc with FastAPI /health endpoint
goal: Create a minimal health service with FastAPI that provides a /health endpoint for monitoring and basic service information
background: We need a foundational health check service that can be used for monitoring and service discovery. This service should be simple, reliable, and follow FastAPI best practices.
inputs: Pydantic for data validation and serialization
deliverables: FastAPI service with /health endpoint in services/healthsvc/
acceptance_criteria: Health response includes status, timestamp, and version fields
Service responds with proper JSON content-type headers
All tests pass with minimum 85% code coverage
Service can be started with uvicorn command
Documentation includes API endpoint descriptions and examples
